---
title: Experimental Findings
format: html
---

![ASE Semi-Dense Point Cloud Visualization](../../figures/ase_semi_dense.png)

![ASE GT Mesh Sample](../../figures/gt_mesh_manhattan_sample.png)

![Candidate Pose Sampling Visualization](../../figures/candidate_pose.png)

![Candidate Pose Sampling Visualization](../../figures/candidate_pose2.png)

## EFM Snippet Visualizations

Quick reference of all visuals currently in `docs/figures/app`.

![Semi-dense point cloud overlay](../../figures/app/semidense.png)

![Trajectory overview](../../figures/app/traj.png)

![Ground-truth OBBs](../../figures/app/gt_obbs.png)

![First vs final frames comparison](../../figures/app/first_final_frames.png)

---

# Candidate Pose Generation

![App options and controls](../../figures/app/app_options.png)

![Candidate set oriented away from trajectory](../../figures/app/cand_away.png)
![Frusta pointing away from reference](../../figures/app/frusta_away.png)
![Direction and distance coverage over full circle](../../figures/app/dir_dist_full_circ.png)

![Candidate distribution over full circle](../../figures/app/candidates_full_circ.png)

![Collision checking](../../figures/app/collision.png)

![Direction jitter](../../figures/app/jitter_dir_issue.png)

## Rendering

![Candidate renders for sampled poses](../../figures/app/candidate_renders.png)
![Rendered frusta with depth overlay](../../figures/app/render_frusta.png)
![Depth histogram diagnostics](../../figures/app/depth_hist.png)

![Back-projected point cloud](../../figures/app/backproj_pc.png)
